pending.body: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:154-163` hardcodes a fresh `RetryPolicy::default_policy()` for the new inner final-review retry loop instead of going through the existing test-stub backoff override path in `src/cli/run.rs:12549-12555`. That means any run started with `RALPH_BURNING_TEST_FAIL_INVOKE_STAGE=final_review` now pays the real 5/10/20/40s retry sleeps inside each reviewer/arbiter invocation before the stage fails. Existing failure-path scenarios such as `src/contexts/conformance_spec/scenarios.rs:4887-4891`, `12411-12415`, and `13474-13478` rely on that env seam to fail fast; with this branch they become minute-long retries instead of immediate deterministic failures.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 3 -> Plan and Implement
